title: rosa × dumetorum var. semiglabra
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. semiglabra, also known as the Rosa dumetorum subsp. semiglabra, is a variant of the Rosa dumetorum, a hybrid rose species native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues. Its health benefits include being used to treat conditions such as diarrhea, fever, and skin irritations, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
